issue.message: Windows file separators (`\`) and drive letter separators (':') must be escaped (`\\`) in property files; use C\\:/Users/kushm/AppData/Local/Android/sdk
Windows file separators (`\`) and drive letter separators (':') must be escaped (`\\`) in property files; use C\\:/src/flutter
Windows file separators (`\`) and drive letter separators (':') must be escaped (`\\`) in property files; use C\\:/Program Files/Android/Android Studio/jbr
A newer version of com.android.tools:desugar_jdk_libs than 2.1.4 is available: 2.1.5
The native library `arm64-v8a/libisar.so` (from `dev.isar.isar_flutter_libs:isar_flutter_libs:1.0`) is not 16 KB aligned
The native library `arm64-v8a/libisar.so` (from `dev.isar.isar_flutter_libs:isar_flutter_libs:1.0`) is not 16 KB aligned
The native library `arm64-v8a/libisar.so` (from `dev.isar.isar_flutter_libs:isar_flutter_libs:1.0`) is not 16 KB aligned
This folder configuration (`v21`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 24. Merge all the resources in this folder into `drawable`.
